please generate a prompt for a new fresh chat, in a way that it holds the consistency of content and format (theme / Latex ) in it. It can be like readme.md for the book repository! give me it as a powershell code (safe not get broken in chat respond! ) 
project path
D:\Code\Books\Mr Khomeini thirst to the power

```powershell
# ============================================================
#  Project: khomeini-promise-critical-study
#  Script:  Initialize-BookReadme.ps1
#  Purpose: Generate README.md for continuing research in new chats
#  Path:    D:\Code\Books\Mr Khomeini thirst to the power
# ============================================================

$ProjectPath = "D:\Code\Books\Mr Khomeini thirst to the power"

# Create directory if not exists
if (-not (Test-Path $ProjectPath)) {
    New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $ProjectPath -Force | Out-Null
    Write-Host "[OK] Created project directory: $ProjectPath" -ForegroundColor Green
}

# Define the README content using a here-string
$ReadmeContent = @'
# Project: khomeini-promise-critical-study

## Book Title (Persian)
**وعده یا خدعه؟** — بررسی انتقادی وعدهٔ عدم نقش‌آفرینی آیت‌الله خمینی پس از انقلاب ۱۳۵۷

## Book Title (English)
**Promise or Deception?** — A Critical Study of Ayatollah Khomeini's Pledge Not to Assume Political Power After the 1979 Revolution

---

## 1  ONE-LINE SUMMARY

A critical, multi-thesis, book-length LaTeX study examining whether Khomeini's pre-revolution promise of not assuming political power was sincere, situationally overridden, or a deliberate political strategy — set against the full chronology of post-revolutionary events (1978-1989).

---

## 2  DOCUMENT ARCHITECTURE

### 2.1  Part Map

| Part | Title (FA) | Chapters | Segment | Status |
|------|-----------|----------|---------|--------|
| Front-matter | پیش‌گفتار و مقدمه — چارچوب نظری و روش‌شناسی | مقدمه + Ch 1 | **Seg 0** | DONE |
| Part I | بخش اول — تزها، دیدگاه‌ها، و مستندات | Ch 2-5 | **Seg 1** | DONE |
| Part II-A | بخش دوم — سیر حوادث و تحلیل تطبیقی (I) | Ch 6-9 | **Seg 2** | DONE |
| Part II-B | بخش دوم — سیر حوادث و تحلیل تطبیقی (II) | Ch 10-12 | **Seg 3** | DONE |
| Part III | بخش سوم — ارزیابی نهایی و نتیجه‌گیری | Ch 13-16 | **Seg 4** | TODO |
| Appendices | پیوست‌ها — جداول تطبیقی، کتاب‌شناسی، نمایه | App A-C + Index | **Seg 5** | TODO |

### 2.2  Chapter Breakdown

```
مقدمه          — طرح مسئله، چرایی اهمیت، روش‌شناسی
فصل ۱         — مروری بر ادبیات پژوهشی (پایان‌نامه‌ها، کتاب‌ها، مقالات)
فصل ۲         — تز اول: صداقت اولیه و تغییر ناگزیر (Situational Override)
فصل ۳         — تز دوم: خدعهٔ آگاهانه و استراتژی بلندمدت (Deliberate Strategy)
فصل ۴         — تز سوم: تکامل تدریجی اندیشهٔ ولایت فقیه (Ideological Evolution)
فصل ۵         — تز چهارم: فشار نخبگان و دینامیک‌های گروهی (Elite Pressure)
فصل ۶         — پیش‌درآمد انقلاب: وعده‌ها در پاریس (۱۳۵۷)
فصل ۷         — بازگشت و فروپاشی دولت بختیار
فصل ۸         — مجلس خبرگان قانون اساسی در برابر پیش‌نویس حبیبی-کاتوزیان
فصل ۹         — ترورهای گروه فرقان و بحران امنیتی
فصل ۱۰        — گروگان‌گیری سفارت آمریکا و بازتاب‌های داخلی
فصل ۱۱        — جنگ ایران و عراق: تهدید خارجی و تمرکز قدرت
فصل ۱۲        — مجاهدین خلق، بنی‌صدر، و تصفیه‌های داخلی
فصل ۱۳        — تحلیل تطبیقی: خمینی در هر بزنگاه چه کرد؟
فصل ۱۴        — خوانش‌های رقیب در بوتهٔ نقد
فصل ۱۵        — ارزیابی شواهد و وزن‌دهی به تزها
فصل ۱۶        — نتیجه‌گیری: وعده یا خدعه؟
پیوست الف     — جدول تطبیقی رویدادها و مواضع خمینی
پیوست ب       — متن‌های کلیدی (مصاحبه‌های پاریس، صحیفهٔ امام)
پیوست ج       — کتاب‌شناسی تفصیلی
نمایه          — اعلام و موضوعات
```

---

## 3  FOUR CORE THESES

| # | Name (FA) | Name (EN) | Core Claim | Key Defenders |
|---|-----------|-----------|------------|---------------|
| 1 | صداقت + اجبار | Sincerity + Situational Override | Khomeini genuinely intended no role; cascading crises forced him in | Baqer Moin, early Soroush, official IRI narrative |
| 2 | خدعهٔ آگاهانه | Deliberate Deception (Khod'eh) | Promises were tactical from the start; part of a long-term power plan | Abrahamian, Ganji, Katouzian, Bani-Sadr |
| 3 | تکامل تدریجی | Ideological Evolution | Velayat-e faqih evolved gradually; Paris was a midpoint, not the endpoint | Arjomand, Vanessa Martin, Kadivar |
| 4 | فشار نخبگان | Elite Pressure / Group Dynamics | Inner circle (Beheshti, IRP) pushed Khomeini toward centralization | Mohsen Milani, Bashiriyeh, Bakhash |

---

## 4  SEVEN KEY TURNING POINTS ANALYZED (Ch 6-12)

| # | Event | Date | Key Question for Each Thesis |
|---|-------|------|------------------------------|
| 1 | Paris interviews & promises | Mehr-Bahman 1357 | What exactly did Khomeini say / not say? |
| 2 | Return & fall of Bakhtiar | 12-22 Bahman 1357 | "I appoint the government" — first breach? |
| 3 | Assembly of Experts vs Habibi-Katouzian draft | Khordad-Azar 1358 | Why was the democratic draft abandoned? |
| 4 | Forqan assassinations | 1358 | Real threat or pretext for crackdown? |
| 5 | US Embassy hostage crisis | 13 Aban 1358 | Spontaneous or coordinated? Who benefited? |
| 6 | Iran-Iraq War | 31 Shahrivar 1359-1367 | Existential threat or tool of consolidation? |
| 7 | MEK, Bani-Sadr, purges, 1367 massacres | 1360-1368 | Systematic elimination pattern? |

---

## 5  DESIGN SYSTEM (LaTeX)

### 5.1  Compilation
- **Engine:** XeLaTeX (mandatory)
- **Passes:** minimum 2 (for TOC and cross-references)

### 5.2  Document Class & Fonts
```latex
\documentclass[12pt,a4paper]{book}
% Persian font:  IRLotus (Scale=1.05)
% Latin font:    TeX Gyre Termes / Times New Roman / Latin Modern (fallback chain)
% digit font:    IRLotus
% Last package:  \usepackage{xepersian}  % MUST be last
```

### 5.3  Color Palette
```latex
\definecolor{cPrimary}{HTML}{1B2A4A}    % Navy — headings, frames
\definecolor{cAccent}{HTML}{C0392B}      % Red — warnings, Thesis 2
\definecolor{cLight}{HTML}{F5F5F0}       % Off-white — box backgrounds
\definecolor{cGray}{HTML}{7F8C8D}        % Gray — secondary text
\definecolor{cGold}{HTML}{B7950B}        % Gold — notes, Thesis 3
\definecolor{cWarn}{HTML}{E67E22}        % Orange — medium warnings
\definecolor{cGreen}{HTML}{27AE60}       % Green — Thesis 1
\definecolor{cConsolid}{HTML}{6C3483}    % Purple — Thesis 4
```

### 5.4  Custom Boxes (tcolorbox)
| Box Name | Use | Frame Color |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| `principleBox` | Chapter summaries, key principles | cPrimary |
| `warningBox` | Critical quotes, counter-evidence | cAccent |
| `noteBox` | Analytical notes, methodology caveats | cGold |
| `infoBox` | Chapter abstracts, neutral info | cPrimary!50 |

### 5.5  Custom Commands
```latex
\newcommand{\keyword}[1]{\textbf{\textcolor{cPrimary}{#1}}}
\newcommand{\warn}[1]{\textcolor{cAccent}{#1}}
\newcommand{\en}[1]{\lr{\textit{#1}}}   % English text in RTL context
```

### 5.6  Visual Elements Used
- **TikZ timelines** — for chronological events
- **TikZ flowcharts** — for crisis-response chains
- **TikZ mindmaps** — for thesis-researcher mapping
- **TikZ feedback loops** — for repression cycles
- **pgf-pie** — for thesis weight distribution
- **longtable + booktabs + colortbl** — for comparative tables
- **Colored cells** — thesis-coded (green=T1, red=T2, gold=T3, purple=T4)

### 5.7  Chapter Structure Pattern
Every chapter follows this template:
1. `\chapter{Title}`
2. `\begin{infoBox}[چکیدهٔ فصل]` — chapter abstract
3. Sections with analysis, tables, TikZ diagrams
4. **In event chapters (6-12):** for each turning point, narrate Khomeini's action, then provide 4-thesis interpretation block inside `principleBox`
5. `\begin{principleBox}[خلاصهٔ فصل N]` — chapter summary with bullet points
6. Footnotes: every factual claim must have `\footnote{}`

### 5.8  Header/Footer
```latex
\fancyhead[RO]{\small\color{cGray} وعده یا خدعه؟ — بررسی انتقادی}
\fancyhead[LE]{\small\color{cGray} وعدهٔ عدم نقش‌آفرینی خمینی}
\fancyfoot[C]{\small\color{cGray}\thepage}
```

---

## 6  KEY SOURCES

### 6.1  Primary Sources
- صحیفهٔ امام (22 vols), Institute for Compilation and Publication of Imam Khomeini's Works
- صورت مشروح مذاکرات مجلس خبرگان قانون اساسی (1358)
- خاطرات هاشمی رفسنجانی (multiple volumes)
- ابراهیم یزدی, آخرین تلاش‌ها در آخرین روزها
- مهدی بازرگان, انقلاب ایران در دو حرکت
- خاطرات آیت‌الله منتظری (internet edition)
- ابوالحسن بنی‌صدر, خیانت به امید
- اسناد لانهٔ جاسوسی (embassy documents)

### 6.2  English-Language Scholarship
- Ervand Abrahamian: *Khomeinism* (1993), *A History of Modern Iran* (2008), *Tortured Confessions* (1999), *Radical Islam* (1989)
- Shaul Bakhash: *The Reign of the Ayatollahs* (1984)
- Said Amir Arjomand: *The Turban for the Crown* (1988)
- Mohsen Milani: *The Making of Iran's Islamic Revolution* (1988; 2nd ed. 1994)
- Nikki Keddie: *Modern Iran: Roots and Results of Revolution* (2003/2006)
- Baqer Moin: *Khomeini: Life of the Ayatollah* (1999)
- Vanessa Martin: *Creating an Islamic State* (2000)
- Asghar Schirazi: *The Constitution of Iran* (1997)
- Mark Bowden: *Guests of the Ayatollah* (2006)
- David Crist: *The Twilight War* (2012)
- Geoffrey Robertson: *The Massacre of Political Prisoners in Iran, 1988* (2010)
- Charles Kurzman: *The Unthinkable Revolution in Iran* (2004)

### 6.3  Persian-Language Scholarship
- محسن کدیور: حکومت ولایی; نظریه‌های دولت در فقه شیعه
- حسین بشیریه: دیباچه‌ای بر جامعه‌شناسی سیاسی ایران
- عبدالکریم سروش: فربه‌تر از ایدئولوژی
- سعید حجاریان: از شاهد قدسی تا شاهد بازاری
- اکبر گنجی: تلقی فاشیستی از دین و حکومت
- عباس میلانی: نگاهی به شاه

---

## 7  EDITORIAL GUIDELINES

1. **Critical-analytical tone** — No hagiography, no polemics. Present each thesis with its strongest evidence, then critique.
2. **Multi-vocal** — Always represent at least two opposing readings of every event.
3. **Source-grounded** — Prefer primary sources (speeches, decrees, memoirs) over secondary commentary.
4. **Persian prose style** — Formal academic Persian; avoid colloquialisms; use `\en{}` for all English terms and names.
5. **Structural consistency** — Every chapter: `infoBox` abstract → analysis → `principleBox` summary.
6. **Thesis color-coding** — Thesis 1 = cGreen, Thesis 2 = cAccent (red), Thesis 3 = cGold, Thesis 4 = cConsolid (purple).
7. **Comparative tables** — At minimum: "Promise vs Reality" table per turning point + "4-thesis interpretation" block per turning point.
8. **Footnotes** — Every factual claim must have `\footnote{}` with source.

---

## 8  CONTENT PRODUCED SO FAR

### 8.1  Segment 0 — DONE
**Contents:** Full LaTeX preamble (all packages, fonts, colors, boxes, headers, commands) + Title page + Legal page + TOC + Introduction (طرح مسئله, روش‌شناسی, ساختار کتاب) + Chapter 1 (مرور ادبیات: primary sources, English scholarship — Abrahamian, Bakhash, Arjomand, Milani, Keddie, Moin, Martin; Persian scholarship — Kadivar, Bashiriyeh, Soroush, Hajjarian, Ganji, A. Milani; dissertations table FA + EN; key articles; memoirs; mindmap of theses-researchers; timeline overview; literature evaluation; gap analysis).

### 8.2  Segment 1 — DONE
**Contents:** `\part{تزها، دیدگاه‌ها، و مستندات}` +
- Ch 2: Thesis 1 (sincerity + override) — traditional marjaiyya, Moin's guardian/governor distinction, Bashiriyeh's revolution-logic framework, Paris interview consistency table (10 entries), behavioral evidence (Bazargan appointment, Qom move), crisis-chain diagram, defenders (Moin, early Soroush, official IRI), critique from T2/T3/T4.
- Ch 3: Thesis 2 (deliberate deception) — taqiyya vs khod'eh concepts, Abrahamian's populism framework, Machiavellian reading, 5 key evidences (Hokumat-e Eslami 1348 quotes, khod'eh statements, systematic elimination pattern diagram, constitution transformation table, pre-revolution clandestine networks), defenders (Abrahamian, Ganji, Katouzian, Bani-Sadr), international dimension, critique from T1/T3/T4.
- Ch 4: Thesis 3 (ideological evolution) — 5-stage evolution diagram (1322→1341→1348→1357→1366), Kashf al-Asrar analysis, Najaf lectures, Paris ambiguity, Velayat-e Motlaqeh 1366 letter, evolution comparison table, defenders (Arjomand, Martin, Kadivar), critique.
- Ch 5: Thesis 4 (elite pressure) — elite competition theory (Mosca, Pareto, Michels, Skocpol), inner circle table (Beheshti, Rafsanjani, Khamenei, Bahonar, Ahmad Khomeini, Khalkhali, Rajaei), 4 mechanisms (constitutional engineering, crisis exploitation, radicalization race with TikZ diagram, parallel institution-building table), Beheshti case study, defenders (Milani, Bashiriyeh, Bakhash), preliminary thesis-weight pie chart, critique.

### 8.3  Segment 2 — DONE
**Contents:** `\part{سیر حوادث و تحلیل تطبیقی}` +
- Ch 6: Paris promises in detail — why Paris, Neauphle-le-Chateau scene, role of advisors (Yazdi/Qotbzadeh/Bani-Sadr) with table + translation-softening analysis, 6 thematic axes of interviews each with quotes + 4-thesis interpretation blocks, Paris timeline TikZ, critical "what Khomeini did NOT say" table (6 silences), silence interpretation.
- Ch 7: Return & fall of Bakhtiar — Bakhtiar's reforms, Khomeini's rejection, Behesht-e Zahra speech ("I appoint the government!" quotes), Paris-vs-Behesht-e-Zahra comparison table, 10-day timeline TikZ, Bazargan appointment analysis ("divine right" phrase), triple power center table, Bakhtiar's fate & coup fear.
- Ch 8: Assembly of Experts vs Habibi-Katouzian draft — drafting team table, 8-point draft features, Khomeini's initial approval then reversal, IRP pressure, constitutional engineering, Assembly composition pie chart, key actors table (Montazeri, Beheshti, Amid-Zanjani, Sahabi, Taleqani), pro/anti VF arguments from proceedings, Taleqani suspicious death, detailed 10-point draft-vs-final comparison table, Khomeini's direct interventions, opposition voices (Shariatmadari, Bazargan, Katouzian), constitution timeline TikZ.
- Ch 9: Forqan assassinations — Forqan ideology & leadership, assassinations table (Qarani, Motahhari, Moffatteh), political consequences (IRGC strengthening, press closures, disarmament), "counter-revolution" concept, Motahhari analysis TikZ (event→consequences→interpretations), repression feedback loop TikZ, armed groups comparison table (6 groups), Forqan penetration question, Kurdistan crisis & jihad fatwa, press closure table, crisis-response comparative table (5 crises × 3 theses), counterfactual assessment.

### 8.4  Segment 3 — DONE
**Contents:**
- Ch 10: Hostage crisis — historical context (1953 coup, Shah admission), "Students Following the Imam's Line," coordination evidence (for/against), Khomeini's quotes ("second revolution," "America cannot do a damn thing"), 4 domestic consequences (Bazargan resignation, constitution referendum acceleration, anti-Americanism, Tabas), consequences chain TikZ, international promise-vs-reality table, 4-thesis interpretation, hostage timeline TikZ.
- Ch 11: Iran-Iraq War — Saddam's motives, "export of revolution" role, 4 mechanisms of war-driven centralization (commander-in-chief, IRGC vs Army table, dissent=treason, continuation past Khorramshahr), Khorramshahr decision analysis with 4-thesis interpretations, war promise-vs-reality table.
- Ch 12: MEK/Bani-Sadr/Purges — Bani-Sadr election & conflicts table, removal timeline TikZ, MEK operations table (7 Tir, 8 Shahrivar), 1360 execution wave (2500-10000), Khomeini's direct role (4 evidences), 1367 massacre (Khomeini's fatwa text, Montazeri's protest, death commissions), 4-phase purge diagram (1357→1368), 4-thesis interpretation of purges, FINAL 10-point promise-vs-reality table, Montazeri dismissal, counterfactual on MEK violence.

### 8.5  Statistics (cumulative through Seg 3)
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Chapters completed | 12 of 16 (+ Introduction) |
| Theses fully presented | 4/4 |
| Turning points analyzed | 7/7 |
| Comparative tables | 26 |
| TikZ diagrams | 20 |
| Footnotes (approx.) | ~220 |
| Researchers profiled | ~30 |
| Estimated pages (A4, 12pt) | ~170 |

---

## 9  WHAT REMAINS (Segments 4 & 5)

### Segment 4 — Chapters 13-16 (Part III: Assessment)

**Chapter 13: تحلیل تطبیقی — خمینی در هر بزنگاه چه کرد؟**
- Master comparative table: 7 turning points × (Khomeini's action + T1 prediction + T2 prediction + T3 prediction + T4 prediction + which thesis best fits)
- Pattern analysis: was the direction of power always toward centralization?
- TikZ: radar chart or scoring matrix

**Chapter 14: خوانش‌های رقیب در بوتهٔ نقد**
- Systematic mutual critique: T1↔T2, T1↔T3, T1↔T4, T2↔T3, T2↔T4, T3↔T4 (6 pairs)
- Strengths and weaknesses table for each thesis
- Can theses be combined? Compatibility matrix

**Chapter 15: ارزیابی شواهد و وزن‌دهی به تزها**
- Psychological concepts: cognitive dissonance, self-deception, motivated reasoning applied to Khomeini
- Evidence weighting methodology
- REVISED pgf-pie chart (after event analysis — compare with preliminary Ch 5 chart)
- Sensitivity analysis: what evidence would change the weights?

**Chapter 16: نتیجه‌گیری — وعده یا خدعه؟**
- Composite answer: likely a combination of T2 + T3 + T4
- Why T1 is weakest but not entirely wrong
- Open questions for future research
- Ethical reflection
- Final principleBox

### Segment 5 — Appendices

**Appendix A:** Master chronological table (all events + Khomeini positions)
**Appendix B:** Key primary texts (Paris interviews excerpts, Hokumat-e Eslami excerpts, 1366 letter, 1367 fatwa)
**Appendix C:** Comprehensive bibliography (FA + EN, organized by type)
**Index:** Names and subjects

---

## 10  HOW TO CONTINUE IN A NEW CHAT

### Template Prompt (copy-paste into new chat):

---

I am writing a Persian-language LaTeX book. Project codename: `khomeini-promise-critical-study`.

**Book:** «وعده یا خدعه؟» — A critical multi-thesis study of Khomeini's promise not to assume power after the 1979 Iranian Revolution.

**Completed so far:** Segments 0-3 (Preamble + Introduction + Chapters 1-12). See details below.

**Current request:** Please produce **Segment [N]** covering Chapters [X-Y] as described below.

**Design rules (MUST follow):**
1. LaTeX only — no preamble (already established in Seg 0). Only `\chapter`, `\section`, etc.
2. Persian formal academic prose. Use `\en{}` for English terms. Use `\keyword{}` for emphasis.
3. Custom boxes: `infoBox` (chapter abstract), `principleBox` (summaries), `warningBox` (critical quotes/counter-evidence), `noteBox` (methodological caveats).
4. Color palette: cPrimary (navy), cAccent (red), cGold, cGreen, cConsolid (purple), cWarn, cLight, cGray.
5. Thesis color-coding: T1=cGreen, T2=cAccent, T3=cGold, T4=cConsolid.
6. Every chapter opens with `infoBox` abstract, closes with `principleBox` summary.
7. At least 1 comparative table (`longtable`+`booktabs`+`colortbl`) and 1 TikZ diagram per chapter.
8. For event chapters: narrate Khomeini's action at each turning point, then provide 4-thesis interpretation block.
9. Every factual claim needs `\footnote{}` with source.
10. End with updated segment status table.

**[Paste relevant chapter descriptions from Section 9 above]**

**Key sources to reference:** [Paste Section 6 above]

---

## 11  FILE STRUCTURE

```
D:\Code\Books\Mr Khomeini thirst to the power\
├── README.md                    ← this file
├── main.tex                     ← full book (concatenate all segments)
├── segments\
│   ├── seg0-preamble-intro.tex  ← Seg 0: preamble + intro + ch1
│   ├── seg1-theses.tex          ← Seg 1: ch2-5
│   ├── seg2-events-i.tex        ← Seg 2: ch6-9
│   ├── seg3-events-ii.tex       ← Seg 3: ch10-12
│   ├── seg4-assessment.tex      ← Seg 4: ch13-16 (TODO)
│   └── seg5-appendices.tex      ← Seg 5: appendices (TODO)
├── figures\                     ← exported TikZ if needed
├── bibliography\
│   └── sources.bib              ← BibTeX (future)
└── build\
    └── output.pdf               ← compiled PDF
```

---

## 12  LICENSE & DISCLAIMER

This is an **academic research document**. All quoted materials are used under fair-use principles for scholarly analysis. The views presented are analytical frameworks, not the author's personal political positions.

---

*Last updated: Segment 3 completion*
*Next action: Request Segment 4 (Chapters 13-16)*
'@

# Write the README file
$ReadmePath = Join-Path $ProjectPath "README.md"
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($ReadmePath, $ReadmeContent, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8)
Write-Host "[OK] README.md created at: $ReadmePath" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "     Size: $((Get-Item $ReadmePath).Length) bytes" -ForegroundColor Cyan

# Create subdirectory structure
$Subdirs = @("segments", "figures", "bibliography", "build")
foreach ($dir in $Subdirs) {
    $fullDir = Join-Path $ProjectPath $dir
    if (-not (Test-Path $fullDir)) {
        New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $fullDir -Force | Out-Null
        Write-Host "[OK] Created: $fullDir" -ForegroundColor DarkGreen
    }
}

# Create placeholder files for segments
$SegmentFiles = @{
    "seg0-preamble-intro.tex" = "% Segment 0: Preamble + Introduction + Chapter 1 — COMPLETED"
    "seg1-theses.tex"         = "% Segment 1: Chapters 2-5 (Four Theses) — COMPLETED"
    "seg2-events-i.tex"       = "% Segment 2: Chapters 6-9 (Events Part I) — COMPLETED"
    "seg3-events-ii.tex"      = "% Segment 3: Chapters 10-12 (Events Part II) — COMPLETED"
    "seg4-assessment.tex"     = "% Segment 4: Chapters 13-16 (Assessment) — TODO"
    "seg5-appendices.tex"     = "% Segment 5: Appendices A-C + Index — TODO"
}

foreach ($file in $SegmentFiles.GetEnumerator()) {
    $filePath = Join-Path $ProjectPath "segments\$($file.Key)"
    if (-not (Test-Path $filePath)) {
        [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($filePath, $file.Value, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8)
        Write-Host "[OK] Created placeholder: segments\$($file.Key)" -ForegroundColor DarkGray
    }
}

# Create a quick-prompt file for easy copy-paste
$QuickPromptContent = @'
I am writing a Persian-language LaTeX book. Project codename: khomeini-promise-critical-study.

Book: A critical multi-thesis study titled "Promise or Deception?" examining Khomeini's promise not to assume political power after the 1979 revolution.

Completed: Segments 0-3 (Preamble + Introduction + Chapters 1-12). Covers: literature review, four theses (sincerity+override, deliberate deception, ideological evolution, elite pressure), and seven turning points (Paris promises, Bakhtiar, Assembly of Experts/constitution, Forqan assassinations, hostage crisis, Iran-Iraq war, MEK/Bani-Sadr/purges/1367 massacre).

Design system: XeLaTeX, IRLotus font, RTL via xepersian (last package), custom tcolorboxes (infoBox, principleBox, warningBox, noteBox), TikZ diagrams, longtable+booktabs, color-coded theses (T1=green, T2=red, T3=gold, T4=purple), \keyword{}, \en{}, \footnote{} on every claim.

Current request: Please produce Segment 4 covering Chapters 13-16:
- Ch 13: Comparative analysis — master table of 7 turning points x 4 theses, pattern analysis
- Ch 14: Mutual critique of rival readings — 6 thesis pairs, compatibility matrix
- Ch 15: Evidence weighting — psychological concepts (cognitive dissonance, self-deception, motivated reasoning), revised pgf-pie chart
- Ch 16: Conclusion — composite answer, open questions, ethical reflection

Follow the same LaTeX style: each chapter opens with infoBox abstract, closes with principleBox summary, at least 1 table and 1 TikZ per chapter, formal Persian, footnotes. No preamble — only chapter content. Update segment status at end.
'@

$QuickPromptPath = Join-Path $ProjectPath "QUICK_PROMPT_SEG4.txt"
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($QuickPromptPath, $QuickPromptContent, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8)
Write-Host "[OK] Quick prompt for Seg 4 saved: $QuickPromptPath" -ForegroundColor Yellow

# Summary
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "  Project initialized successfully!" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "  Path: $ProjectPath" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "  README.md: Full project context for new chats" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "  QUICK_PROMPT_SEG4.txt: Ready-to-paste prompt" -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "Next steps:" -ForegroundColor White
Write-Host "  1. Paste content of each completed segment into segments\segN-*.tex" -ForegroundColor Gray
Write-Host "  2. Open a new chat and paste QUICK_PROMPT_SEG4.txt (or README.md Section 10)" -ForegroundColor Gray
Write-Host "  3. After receiving Seg 4, save to segments\seg4-assessment.tex" -ForegroundColor Gray
Write-Host "  4. Repeat for Seg 5" -ForegroundColor Gray
Write-Host "  5. Concatenate all segments into main.tex and compile with XeLaTeX" -ForegroundColor Gray
```

**How to run:**

```powershell
# Save the script then run:
Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process -ExecutionPolicy Bypass
& "D:\Code\Books\Mr Khomeini thirst to the power\Initialize-BookReadme.ps1"
